nodes.name: 紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡（Red-browed amazon，学名 Amazona rhodocorytha），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened both by habitat loss and by being captured for the trade in wild parrots

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Another threat is the illegal collection of young birds for the international pet trade. This bird is present in several wildlife reserves but is not effectively protected against poaching even there
